race.comment: The scratchings have weakened this race and have left SNEAKY PEE CEE (3) as the clear top pick. Back in class after he knocked-up late with the 59kg to secure second over 1000m at Albury. Gets the right run from the inside marble and looks hard to hold out. VAINSTREAM (5) is a tough old gelding holding his form having recorded top-three finishes in the last four outings including a Canberra win. Tricky map today and can take a hand in the finish. SANTOLINI (7) will be fitter for recent racing so can show more today. INSANE VOLT (6) draws well and was a winner here three back so can measure up on best form.
